hookTypes.name: Question
hookTypes.description: Opens with a direct question to the viewer

hookTypes.name: Shock/Contrarian
hookTypes.description: Surprising or provocative statement to grab attention
examples: Everything you know about X is wrong
This is why X is a scam

hookTypes.name: Story
examples: So this happened to me yesterday...
I was at the store when...

hookTypes.name: Insight
hookTypes.description: Leads with a takeaway or lesson
examples: Here's what I learned after 5 years of...

hookTypes.name: Authority
examples: As a doctor, I can tell you...
I've been doing this for 10 years

hookTypes.name: Confession
examples: I have to be honest about something...

hookTypes.name: List
examples: 3 things you need to know about...

hookTypes.name: Pattern Interrupt
hookTypes.description: Unexpected opening that breaks viewer expectations
